{{CargoRelic
|name=Sphere of Corrosion
|class_id=20429
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This crystal ball is full of acid so that you can launch acidic attacks with a spell. It can dissolve and significantly reduce the target's armor protection, all the while disfiguring the enemy for serious psychological damage!
|fame=29
|art=15
|fth=16
|civ=19
|tech=11
|ss1=Poison DMG +5
|ss2=Poison DMG +10
|ss3=Poison DMG +15
|ss4=Poison DMG +15
|ss7=Poison DMG +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
